calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-13-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:36am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, dept. 525, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Respondent, John Burke, appears in Pro Per; Appellant,
American Financial Services, Inc., appear through counsel, Sean P. Nalty; Appellant, Long Beach Acceptance Corp. (as listed in ROA) appears through counsel, Jason M. Julian. Appearing as a witness with Life Insurance of North America Co. is Dianna Fuller.
Parties and the witness, previously sworn, testify in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Myles.
EXHA(1) Trial brief from American Financial Services, Inc.
EXHA(2) Declaration of Dianna Fuller
EXHA(3) Trial brief by Life Insurance Co. of North America
EXHA(4) Declaration of Annie Hung
EXHR(A) Respondent's statement of facts
11:02am
Matter is submitted. Newly marked evidence is retained.
NOTE: Appellant, Long Beach Acceptance Corp. was bought out by American Financial Services, Inc. The clerk will change the name in the ROA to reflect the newly named Appellant.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-08-2010 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-17-2009 Continued To Feb-03-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506
